videos.headline: Tennessee's James Pearce Jr. takes back 52-yard pick-six
videos.description: James Pearce Jr. picks off Deacon Hill and takes it back to the Volunteers' end zone with a 52-yard pick-six.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tennessee's James Pearce Jr. takes back 52-yard pick-six) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tennessee's Elijah Herring gets the sack on Deacon Hill
videos.description: Elijah Herring sacks Iowa quarterback Deacon Hill for a loss of seven yards.

tracking.trackingName: CFB_One-Play (Tennessee's Elijah Herring gets the sack on Deacon Hill) 1/1/24

videos.headline: Iowa's Tory Taylor breaks single-season punt record
videos.description: Iowa's Tory Taylor sets the FBS record for the most punt yards in a single season.

tracking.trackingName: CFB_One-Play (Iowa's Tory Taylor breaks single-season punt record) 1/1/24

videos.headline: Tennessee's Andre Turrentine intercepts Deacon Hill in the end zone
videos.description: Andre Turrentine makes a nice read and intercepts Iowa's Deacon Hill in the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tennessee's Andre Turrentine intercepts Deacon Hill in the end zone) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Volunteers' Nico Iamaleava scores 19-yard rushing TD
videos.description: Nico Iamaleava gives Tennessee a one-score lead with a 19-yard rushing touchdown against Iowa.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Volunteers' Nico Iamaleava scores 19-yard rushing TD) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tennessee's Nico Iamaleava scores second TD
videos.description: Nico Iamaleava finds the end zone again with a 3-yard rushing touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tennessee's Nico Iamaleava scores second TD) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Iowa's Joe Evans makes nice sack on Nico Iamaleava
videos.description: Nico Iamaleava goes down from Joe Evan's sack on the 45-yard line.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Iowa's Joe Evans makes nice sack on Nico Iamaleava) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: McCallan Castles gives Volunteers another TD
videos.description: Nico Iamaleava throws an 18-yard touchdown pass to McCallan Castles to extend Tennessee's lead over Iowa.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (McCallan Castles gives Volunteers another TD) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tennessee coach Josh Heupel dumped with Cheez-It crackers after win
videos.description: Josh Heupel gets a bucket of Cheez-It crackers dumped on him after his squad beat Iowa 35-0 in the Cheez-It Citrus Bowl.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tennessee coach Josh Heupel dumped with Cheez-It crackers after win) 2024/1/1 ESHEET

videos.headline: 'Ched-Z' slides box of Cheez-It crackers through Josh Heupel's postgame interview
videos.description: Mascot "Ched-Z" slides a box of Cheez-It crackers while Josh Heupel is giving his postgame interview about his team's win.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play ('Ched-Z' slides box of Cheez-It crackers through Josh Heupel's postgame interview) 2024/1/1 ESHEET
